name: Ishmael Reed
description: American poet, novelist, essayist, songwriter, playwright, editor and publisher
abstract: Ishmael Scott Reed (born February 22, 1938) is an American poet, novelist, essayist, songwriter, composer, playwright, editor and publisher known for his satirical works challenging American political culture. Perhaps his best-known work is Mumbo Jumbo (1972), a sprawling and unorthodox novel set in 1920s New York.

about_quotes.speaker: David Murray
about_quotes.evidence: I probably will do a recording with Taj Mahal and Ishmael Reed, another Gwo-Ka with Kip Hanrahan.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Murray interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, September 18, 2003
